5c285a797e9609398856528a5ca6e7a59174374f: {"action": "answer", "confidence": 0.9, "sql": "SELECT c.region AS region, SUM(o.quantity) AS total_quantity FROM orders AS o JOIN customers AS c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id GROUP BY c.region ORDER BY c.region", "title": "Total order quantity per customer region", "assumptions": ["\"total order quantity\" means SUM(orders.quantity)", "Orders with a null customer_id (25% of orders) cannot be attributed to a region and are excluded by the join", "region comes from the customers table"], "lineage": ["orders.csv.quantity", "orders.csv.customer_id", "customers.csv.customer_id", "customers.csv.region"], "clarification": null, "reason": null}
